channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: UK Businesses Struggle to Scale AI Usage, New Research Reveals
item.description: Asana's research highlights that two-thirds of UK companies are failing to scale AI tools across their organizations, with a distinct 'leadership bubble' where technology doesn't get disseminated more broadly.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Pixel Weather app's radar map has mysteriously disappeared and no one knows why
item.description: Users are reporting that the real time radar map has gone from the Weather app across every Pixel phone.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 12 ways to accelerate digital transformation
item.description: CEOs prize transformation and reinvention, seeing both as essential to current and future competitiveness. But successful transformation and reinvention are no longer enough, top executives say. They must happen fast, and their delivery must get faster over time.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Everything new on Apple TV+ in April 2025: The Studio, Your Friends and Neighbors, Government Cheese, and more
item.description: There are a whole host of new shows, plus new episodes of currently running Apple TV+ series, that demand your attention in April.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: AI enables paralyzed man to control robotic arm with brain signals
item.description: The combination of artificial intelligence and neuroscience allows a paralyzed man to manipulate a robotic arm by using his brain to imagine movements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Millions of solar power systems could be at risk of cyber attacks after researchers find flurry of vulnerabilities
item.description: Hackers could exploit weak security in solar inverters, manipulating energy production, stealing user data, and even disrupting entire power networks with alarming ease.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tesla protests across Bay Area ignite Trump resistance, but intra-party strife ahead
item.description: After almost stunned paralysis among Democrats in the early weeks of Trump’s onslaught of executive orders, the Trump resistance is gaining traction.
item.dc:creator: Julia Prodis Sulek, The Mercury News

item.title: iMessage still lags behind its peers. 4 ways Apple should update it for iOS 19
item.description: Few apps are as inextricably linked to the iPhone as Apple’s Messages. Introduced with the original iPhone almost 18 years ago, the app (then called “Text”) has become the primary messenger for most iPhone users worldwide.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Leaked renders of the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 FE may have revealed the affordable foldable's design
item.description: This could be our first look at the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 FE, which is due to launch in four months' time.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nuclear Power on the Rise: States Compete to Build Next-Generation Reactors
item.description: As states vye for nuclear power supremacy, regulators and residents face concerns over safety, regulations, and supply chain logistics.
item.dc:creator: Marc Levy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Facebook’s new throwback move: a feed just for friends
item.description: Meta wants to revive Facebook’s old-school appeal by introducing a new Friends Tab, which will focus solely on posts shared by a user’s friends and family. This Friends Tab will replace the section in the app that previously displayed friend requests and suggested friends.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Here’s your first hands-on look at the Star Wars: Grogu, Mandalorian, R2-D2, and Darth Vader earbuds
item.description: Star Wars has collaborated with Audio-Technica for four custom earbuds, and TechRadar has your exclusive first-look hands-on experience with all four.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk sells X to his own xAI for $33 billion in all-stock deal
item.description: Elon Musk has sold social media site X to his own xAI artificial intelligence company in a $33 billion all-stock deal, the billionaire announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A Nvidia chip shortage is coming, warns major Chinese server maker
item.description: One of China’s largest server makers, H3C, has flagged potential shortages of Nvidia’s H20 chip, the most advanced AI processor legally available domestically under U.S. export controls, in a client notice seen by Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Group chats rule the world
item.description: How many group chats are you involved in? For me, it varies. Right now, there are only two — and both are of a more private nature.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What to know about earthquakes like the one that hit Myanmar
item.description: A major 7.7 magnitude earthquake that originated near Mandalay, Myanmar shook the Earth as far as Bangkok.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Convicted of bilking investors, Nikola founder and Trump donor gets a presidential pardon
item.description: The founder of an electric car start-up sentenced to prison for exaggerating the potential of his technology has been pardoned by President Donald Trump, potentially wiping out hundreds of millions of dollars in restitution that prosecutors were seeking for bamboozled investors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tiny Silicon Valley drugmaker soars on FDA win to treat never-ending hunger
item.description: Shares of the Redwood City-based Soleno Therapeutics climbed 38% — the biggest one-day gain since September 2023 — to their highest level in more than eight years.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: La Diputación de Girona optimiza el uso de sus recursos mediante la automatización
item.description: El Departamento de Intervención de la Diputación de Girona ha implementado de la mano de Atos un proyecto de automatización de procesos (RPA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The RACI matrix: Your blueprint for project success
item.description: Having managed and rescued dozens of projects, and helped others do so, I’ve noted that there is always one critical success factor (CSF) that has either been effectively addressed or missed/messed up: clarity around the roles and responsibilities for each project participant and key stakeholder.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Why Tesla may be spared from Trump’s auto tariffs
item.description: As the global auto world reeled from the potential fallout of Donald Trump‘s new auto tariffs, one name stood out as less affected than others—electric-vehicle maker Tesla. The Texas-based company’s shares were the rare automotive stock to trade in the green in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts
item.description: The DOGE impact on federal cyber spending remains to be seen, but cyber program leaders are hoping to avoid any major cuts by emphasizing the ROI. The post Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Schumer, Democrats call for full, unredacted transcript of Signal attack chat
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) and his Democratic colleagues are calling for a full, unredacted transcript of the Trump administration’s Signal group chat. “Yesterday’s revelations were alarming, but they were not enough.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Kyndryl extends Google Cloud partnership for AI-based mainframe modernization
item.description: Kyndryl and Google Cloud are expanding their partnership to help customers use generative AI to move data off the mainframe and into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
